Agony.title: Agony
Agony.name: Agony
Agony.description: on being [color=#ffff50]dealt damage[/color]: raise it to [color=#ff5050]2%[/color] of max Life [color=#707070]after other bonuses[/color]

Scorch.title: Scorch
Scorch.name: Scorch
Scorch.description: per stack: dealt 10 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] [color=#707070]repeat per 20 stacks[/color]

Poison.title: Poison
Poison.name: Poison
Poison.description: You are poisoned. You will take poison damage every turn equal to 10% of your maximum life.

Sickness.title: Sickness
Sickness.name: Sickness
Sickness.description: per stack: [color=#ff3030]-10[/color] [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color], dealt 5 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]

Plague.title: Plague
Plague.name: Plague
Plague.description: per stack: [color=#ff3030]-1%[/color] [color=#ffff50]all resistances[/color] [color=#a0a0a0]to 0% max[/color], dealt 10 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] / [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage and spread stacks to an adjacent ally on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]

Freeze.title: Freeze
Freeze.name: Freeze
Freeze.description: per stack: [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#50ffff]Dodge[/color], [color=#ff3030]-1 [/color][color=#20ff20]Speed[/color], dealt 5 [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], dealt 1 [color=#af8f50]Blunt[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Poise.title: Poise
Poise.name: Poise
Poise.description:
per stack: [color=#5050ff]+5 Armor[/color], [color=#5050ff]+5 Block[/color], [color=#ffa050]+10 Accuracy[/color]

[color=#ff5050]25% removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]step[/color]

Repulsion.title: Repulsion
Repulsion.name: Repulsion
Repulsion.description: per stack: deal 1 [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to the attacker on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Refraction.title: Refraction
Refraction.name: Refraction
Refraction.description: per stack: [color=#5050ff]+1 Armor[/color], deal 10 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to the attacker on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Grace.title: Grace
Grace.name: Grace
Grace.description: per stack: take [color=#ffff50]-5[/color] damage, deal 5 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to the attacker on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Inflame.title: Inflame
Inflame.name: Inflame
Inflame.description:
per stack: [color=#ffa050]+10 Accuracy[/color], [color=#ff8030]+20 Hit[/color]

[color=#ff5050]50% removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]being hit[/color]

Attune.title: Attune
Attune.name: Attune
Attune.description: per stack: [color=#ff8030]+10 Hit[/color], [color=#5050ff]+20 Armor[/color], [color=#ffff50]+1%[/color] damage dealt

Meditate.title: Meditate
Meditate.name: Meditate
Meditate.description:
per stack: [color=#ffff50]+10[/color] damage dealt

[color=#ff5050]50% removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]step[/color]

Dream.title: Dream
Dream.name: Dream
Dream.description:
per stack: [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#50ffff]Dodge[/color], [color=#ff3030]-2 [/color][color=#20ff20]Speed[/color], deal 10 [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] / [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to the closest enemy on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]

[color=#ff5050]removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]step[/color] or [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Windstrike.title: Windstrike
Windstrike.name: Windstrike
Windstrike.description:
[color=#50ffff]+300 Dodge[/color], [color=#20ff20]+100 Speed[/color]

[color=#80ff80]repeat[/color] per stack: deal [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage equal to your Main-hand Hit to the target on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]; then [color=#ff5050]remove[/color]

Mark.title: Mark
Mark.name: Mark
Mark.description:
per stack: increase all [color=#af8f50]Physical[/color] damage taken by [color=#ffff50]10%[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]"Physical" damage is Slash, Blunt and Pierce[/color]

Berserk.title: Berserk
Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.description:
grants an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] [color=#707070]on initial attack[/color]

per stack: [color=#20ff20]+1 Speed[/color], [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#50ffff]Dodge[/color], [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#5050ff]Block[/color]

Evasion.title: Evasion
Evasion.name: Evasion
Evasion.description:
per stack: [color=#50ffff]+20 Dodge[/color]

[color=#ff5050]50% removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]

Charge.title: Charge
Charge.name: Charge
Charge.description:
per stack: [color=#ffff50]+5[/color] damage dealt

[color=#ff5050]50% removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]

Gust.title: Gust
Gust.name: Gust
Gust.description: [color=#80ff80]repeat[/color] per stack: deal 50 + Dexterity [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage in a path to 1 enemy at any range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]; then [color=#ff5050]remove[/color]

Protection.title: Protection
Protection.name: Protection
Protection.description:
on being [color=#ffff50]dealt damage by another unit[/color]: limit it to [color=#ffff50]1[/color], [color=#ff5050]20% chance to remove[/color] on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color] / [color=#ffff50]dealt damage[/color]

this effect may [color=#ff5050]never have more than 1 stack[/color]

Corrosion.title: Corrosion
Corrosion.name: Corrosion
Corrosion.description: per stack: [color=#ff3030]-20 [/color][color=#5050ff]Block[/color], [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#5050ff]Armor[/color],  dealt 1 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Doom.title: Doom
Doom.name: Doom
Doom.description: per stack: dealt 5 [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Batform.title: Batform
Batform.name: Batform
Batform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color] / [color=#5050ff]Block[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: [color=#20ff20]+1 Speed[/color], [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5 on [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]

Snakeform.title: Snakeform
Snakeform.name: Snakeform
Snakeform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: [color=#50ffff]+10 Dodge[/color], [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 10 on [color=#78bca4]divine intervention[/color]

Wormform.title: Wormform
Wormform.name: Wormform
Wormform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: apply 2 [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Flameform.title: Flameform
Flameform.name: Flameform
Flameform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: apply 2 [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Sparkform.title: Sparkform
Sparkform.name: Sparkform
Sparkform.description:
transformation: [color=#20ff20]+30 Speed[/color], [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#5050ff]Block[/color] / [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: deal 10 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Drakeform.title: Drakeform
Drakeform.name: Drakeform
Drakeform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], perform a 50 damage [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against adjacent enemies on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

per stack: [color=#5050ff]+10 Armor[/color], [color=#5050ff]+20 Block[/color], deal 25 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Lizardform.title: Lizardform
Lizardform.name: Lizardform
Lizardform.description:
transformation: [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] limited to [color=#ff3030]15[/color], [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color] deal [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to the attacker equal to your [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color]

per stack: [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 10 and apply 5 [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color] / [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] / [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] to the target on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Horrorform.title: Horrorform
Horrorform.name: Horrorform
Horrorform.description:
transformation: [color=#20ff20]+50 Speed[/color], [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color] / [color=#5050ff]Block[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: apply 10 [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] and deal 1 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to the enemy on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Treeform.title: Treeform
Treeform.name: Treeform
Treeform.description:
transformation: [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] limited to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#ffff50]+75% all resistances[/color] except [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color]

[color=#ff5050]removed[/color] on [color=#ffff50]step[/color] or [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Vineform.title: Vineform
Vineform.name: Vineform
Vineform.description:
transformation: [color=#ff3030]-50%[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire resistance[/color], summon a [color=#20af50]Root[/color] on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy on [color=#ffff50]step[/color]

per stack: [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5 to all allies and grant [color=#ff8030]+10 Hit[/color] to allied [color=#00a000]Plants[/color] on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

Geistform.title: Geistform
Geistform.name: Geistform
Geistform.description:
transformation: [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] limited to [color=#ff3030]10[/color], [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], perform all of your "[color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]" actions on [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] [color=#707070]if enemies live / does not tick down effects[/color]

per stack: [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 1 and apply 1 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] [color=#707070]if enemies live[/color]

Beastform.title: Beastform
Beastform.name: Beastform
Beastform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#ff3030]-1[/color] stack when performing a non-[color=#ff8030]attack[/color] action [color=#707070]stand still / step / prayer[/color] 

per stack: perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Crowform.title: Crowform
Crowform.name: Crowform
Crowform.description:
transformation: [color=#5050ff]Block[/color] / [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color] 

per stack: [color=#ffff50]+1%[/color] damage dealt

Wildform.title: Wildform
Wildform.name: Wildform
Wildform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: deal 10 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage in a path to 1 enemy in a 3 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], repeat with [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] / [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage

Anqarak.title: Anqarak
Anqarak.name: Anqarak
Anqarak.description:
transformation: grants 2 [color=#ff8030]extra attacks[/color] [color=#707070]on initial attack[/color], [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#5050ff]Block[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: deal 2 [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to the enemy on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Newtform.title: Newtform
Newtform.name: Newtform
Newtform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: apply 2 [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range on [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

[color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] per stack: [color=#ff3030]-20 [/color][color=#5050ff]Block[/color], [color=#ff3030]-10 [/color][color=#5050ff]Armor[/color],  dealt 1 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

Jackalform.title: Jackalform
Jackalform.name: Jackalform
Jackalform.description:
transformation: [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color]

per stack: [color=#20ff20]+1 Speed[/color], [color=#ff8030]+10 Hit[/color], [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5 on [color=#ffff50]kill[/color]

Crystalform.title: Crystalform
Crystalform.name: Crystalform
Crystalform.description:
transformation: [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] set to [color=#ff3030]1[/color], [color=#ff0000]Inflexibility doubled[/color], perform all of your "[color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]" actions on [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] [color=#707070]if enemies live / does not tick down effects[/color]

per stack: [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 1 and apply 1 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] [color=#707070]if enemies live[/color]
